subcodes.title: Words to Mary Hanford Ford, spoken on 1911-10-27
subcodes.first_line: Pay not attention to things material but reach after the Spirit. Fix your eyes on the Sun of Truth
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @Manifestation of God as sun, @The Holy Spirit, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @Christ; Christianity
